title: elaphoglossum subglabricaule
intro: Elaphoglossum subglabricaule is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum subglabricaule are said to include reducing fever and alleviating pain, as well as having potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
